title: Volumes as OCI artefacts
body:
### Feature request description

This is a feature I wish podman has had for a while:

https://kubernetes.io/blog/2024/08/16/kubernetes-1-31-image-volume-source/

build a directory structure as an OCI artefact, push to to an OCI registry so someone can download and bind mount somewhere.

Basically downloadable volumes from OCI registries.


### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
